## 5. Reproduction Commands

```bash
# Run all three verification scripts:
python3 verify_t003_prompts.py    # Prompt hash + meta-hint scan
python3 verify_t003_matches.py    # Match determinism replay (50 games)
python3 verify_t003_stats.py      # BT rankings + GPT-5.4 bootstrap + build diversity

# Each script appends its output to this document (docs/T003_INTEGRITY.md).
# To regenerate from scratch, delete this file and run all three scripts.
```
